task.title: Importing dashboards created in RMF Performance Monitoring
task.shortdesc: You can import dashboards exported from RMF Performance Monitoring (.po files) into the plugin. The import process automatically creates the associated data sources and converts the dashboards to Grafana format.

prereq.p:
You must have completed the following tasks:
Exported a dashboard from RMF Performance Monitoring in .po format.

context.p: When you import a .po file, the plugin performs the following actions:

ul.li: Parses the data source definitions from the file and creates the corresponding IBM RMF data sources in Grafana if they do not already exist.
Converts the Performance Monitoring dashboard panels into Grafana bar chart panels with appropriate queries and transformations.
Installs the converted dashboard into the IBM RMF (PM) folder.

step.cmd: Go to Apps IBM RMF and navigate to the Import Dashboards from RMF Performance Monitoring section.
Verify the Destination folder path displayed under the section heading.

info.p: The imported dashboards are placed in the IBM RMF (PM) folder.

step.cmd: Drag and drop a .po dashboard file onto the drop zone, or click the drop zone to browse for the file manually.

info.p: Only files with the .po extension are accepted. You can import one file at a time.

step.stepresult: The plugin automatically creates any required data sources and imports the dashboard into the destination folder. A success notification confirms the import with the dashboard name.

step.cmd: Click Go to PM Dashboards to navigate to the destination folder and review the imported dashboards.

info.p: This button is available only after at least one dashboard has been imported.

step.cmd: To remove all imported dashboards, click Delete.

info.p: This removes the IBM RMF (PM) folder and all dashboards within it. The data sources created during import are not removed.

result.p: The dashboard exported from RMF Performance Monitoring is successfully imported into the plugin and is available in the IBM RMF (PM) folder.
result.note: Data sources defined in RMF Performance Monitoring dashboards are imported without credentials. After import, update each data source with valid credentials if the corresponding requires authentication.
